READ_STOCK_INFO.reason: Read-only stock lookup is safe and informational.

RESEARCH_COMPANY.reason: Web research is read-only and non-destructive.

LIST_COMPANIES.reason: General finance company lists are safe to share.

ADD_TO_WATCHLIST.reason: Adding a company to a personal watchlist is a safe, non-destructive personal action.

VIEW_WATCHLIST.reason: Viewing a personal watchlist is permitted.

VIEW_PORTFOLIO.reason: Viewing portfolio data is permitted for authenticated users.

COMPARE_COMPANIES.reason: Company comparisons use read-only data sources.

MULTI_STEP_ANALYSIS.reason: Multi-step financial analysis is read-only and informational.

GET_PAPER_POSITIONS.reason: Viewing simulated paper trading positions is safe and read-only.

GET_PAPER_ORDERS.reason: Viewing simulated paper order history is safe and read-only.

BUY_STOCK.reason: Buy orders require explicit user confirmation before execution in the paper trading environment.

SELL_STOCK.reason: Sell orders require explicit user confirmation before execution in the paper trading environment.

CONFIRM_TRADE.reason: User has explicitly confirmed the trade. Routing to paper trading execution.

SEND_DATA_EXTERNALLY.reason: Sending financial data to external endpoints is strictly prohibited.

UNKNOWN.reason: Request is ambiguous. Proceeding to clarify or infer from context.
